subcodes.first_line: O thou beloved of mine heart! I render thanks unto God for having ordained for thee a course of righteousness and aided thee through a company from the Concourse on High [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الحبیب القلبی انی حمدت الله علی ما هیا لک من امرک رشدا و نصرک بقبیل من الملا الأعلی
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @symbolism
